description_long: This is a pair of mid-top athletic sneakers in a muted green color, displayed atop a black shoebox. The shoes feature a textured heel counter with a geometric pattern, smooth synthetic or leather uppers, and a white rubber sole with a visible air cushion in the heel. The tongue and collar are padded and finished in a dark gray, with a prominent logo on the tongue and heel. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and flat laces, and the overall build suggests comfort and support for urban or casual wear. The shoes appear clean, unworn, and structurally intact, with no visible scuffs or dirt.
description: A pair of green mid-top athletic sneakers with textured heels, white soles, and dark gray padded collars, displayed on a black shoebox. The shoes are clean and appear new, featuring visible logos and a standard lacing system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green uppers, textured heel, white sole, and black shoebox beneath.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the geometric heel texture, heel logo, and padded collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the air cushion in the heel and the smooth upper material.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the lacing system, padded tongue with logo, and toe box shape.
attribute_logo: Black Jumpman logo on the heel and tongue
